Name: Sunna

PartnerInfo.ImpressionF:
Sometimes Sunna reminds me of some kind of rare creature in a game — she only spawns under very specific conditions!
Last time, I had to bug her for a whole week just to get her to go clothes shopping with me!
PartnerInfo.ImpressionM: Yeah, I've had my fair share of Belle's nonstop badgering... I bet Sunna couldn't handle it either.
PartnerInfo.ProfileDesc:
Sunna is a member of the Angels of Delusion idol group and the composer behind all of the group's music. Maintaining top-tier songwriting while keeping pace with rehearsals and stage performances is anything but easy for her. When the pressure piles up, she occasionally employs the tactic of "retreat is the best option" to dodge Captain Nangong Yu's brutal scheduling.
Note: Reliable intelligence suggests that this tactic works largely because Nangong Yu intentionally lets it slide.

Sunna and Nangong Yu, another member of the Angels of Delusion, have known each other since they were young and grew up together. While they appear to always squabble, the two are in fact deeply dependent on one another. When it comes to music, Sunna shares a strong connection with their final member, Aria. As Aria puts it, the two frequently spend whole days in the studio discussing melodies for new songs, only to drift off to sleep without even realizing it, heads resting against each other.

Sunna is fairly introverted and prefers spending time alone over group activities. That said, her two teammates know her weaknesses all too well — she finds it hard to say no and can't handle praise — and are helping her gradually overcome her social anxiety through desensitization training (progress: about 25%).

While most fans see Sunna's "hopeless" side as endearing, she herself seems eager to tear off that label and become a confident, "proper idol." As the creative force behind the music, she often wants to flee the stage — yet in truth, she's not as indifferent to performing as she claims to be.
Evidence: A sticky note by Sunna's bedside that reads "I can't disappoint the fans. I need to give them my very best on stage!"
UnlockCondition: Unlocked after completing Main Commission Season 2 Interlude: "Encore for an Old Dream"

TrustLv.1:
Sunna is a member of the Angels of Delusion idol group and the composer behind all of the group's music. Maintaining top-tier songwriting while keeping pace with rehearsals and stage performances is anything but easy for her. When the pressure piles up, she occasionally employs the tactic of "retreat is the best option" to dodge Captain Nangong Yu's brutal scheduling.
Note: Reliable intelligence suggests that this tactic works largely because Nangong Yu intentionally lets it slide.

Sunna and Nangong Yu, another member of the Angels of Delusion, have known each other since they were young and grew up together. While they appear to always squabble, the two are in fact deeply dependent on one another. When it comes to music, Sunna shares a strong connection with their final member, Aria. As Aria puts it, the two frequently spend whole days in the studio discussing melodies for new songs, only to drift off to sleep without even realizing it, heads resting against each other.

Sunna is fairly introverted and prefers spending time alone over group activities. That said, her two teammates know her weaknesses all too well — she finds it hard to say no and can't handle praise — and are helping her gradually overcome her social anxiety through desensitization training (progress: about 25%).

While most fans see Sunna's "hopeless" side as endearing, she herself seems eager to tear off that label and become a confident, "proper idol." As the creative force behind the music, she often wants to flee the stage — yet in truth, she's not as indifferent to performing as she claims to be.
Evidence: A sticky note by Sunna's bedside that reads "I can't disappoint the fans. I need to give them my very best on stage!"
TrustLv.3:
Sunna has a weakness for sweets that look cute, which often leads her to buy treats that are all looks and far too sugary — something Nangong never misses a chance to tease her about. Even so, when Nangong and Aria pick out gifts for Sunna, they always settle on cupcakes with colorful, eye-catching designs.
Sunna also loves things with gentle, fragrant scents and often makes scented candles herself, as they help her focus her thoughts and spark inspiration. Once she enters her own "musical kingdom," she becomes so absorbed that she can barely hear anything from the outside world.
Note: According to Aria, Sunna once burned Nangong's limited-edition teapot dry while writing a song. To make it up to her, Sunna spent more than two weeks serving tea and running errands for Nangong as an apology.

3114910.Name: Sunna: Dreams on Loop
3114910.Desc: Put on the outfit she finds cutest, and she can break free from the crowd, slipping into the lingering echoes of delusion.

3114911.Name: Sunna: Afternoon Tea Break
3114911.Desc:
Freshly baked cake, rich aromatic coffee, and the warm afternoon sun...
Wrapped in moments of softness, it's time to begin today's tea break.

Description.Name: Basic Attack: Mischief Meteor Hammer
Description.Desc:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Unleashes up to four attacks ahead, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.

Description.Name: Basic Attack: Naughty Cat Spotted
Description.Desc:
During combat, when Sunna is off-field and there are no enemies with <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color>, Bubblegum consumes 1 Claw Sharpener to automatically launch an attack, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.
When any squad member activates <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil</color>, Sunna gains 2 <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpeners</color>.
When any squad member applies an Attribute Anomaly to an enemy, Sunna gains 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpener</color>. This effect can trigger at most once every 10s.
Bubblegum inherits Sunna's initial ATK. Sunna can hold up to 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpeners</color>.

Description.Name: Dodge: Can't Hit Me
Description.Desc:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: Dash Attack: Skyward Hammer
Description.Desc:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Launches enemies in front into the air, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.

Description.Name: Dodge Counter: Delusion Strikeout
Description.Desc:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate:
Strikes enemies in front with a series of hammer blows, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: Special Attack: Star Shooter
Description.Desc:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Shoots Bubblegum to attack enemies in front using an air gun, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>. After activation, Bubblegum enters combat.

Description.Name: EX Special Attack: Bubblegum Barrage
Description.Desc:
With enough energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Hurls Bubblegum at the target, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>. After activation, Bubblegum enters combat.
Upon activating this skill, all Agents in the squad gain Angelic Chord-ination for 40s.
Landing a heavy attack with this skill triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: EX Special Attack: Special Photography Technique
Description.Desc:
While in the Angelic Chord-ination state, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate, or during <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Bubblegum Barrage</color>, keep holding <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to quickly activate:
Attacks the target enemy in coordination with Bubblegum, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>. After activation, Bubblegum enters combat.
Before the heavy attack is executed, activates <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil: Delusion Reprise</color>. While <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil: Delusion Reprise</color> is active, all squad members gain an additional 50 ATK for 40s. Re-activating <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil: Delusion Reprise</color> will cancel the existing instance of <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil: Delusion Reprise</color>.
Landing a heavy attack with this skill triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill. <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Special Photography Technique</color> can be used once each time Sunna enters the Angelic Chord-ination state.

Param.Name: Bubblegum Barrage DMG Multiplier when quickly chaining into Special Photography Technique
Bubblegum Barrage Daze Multiplier when quickly chaining into Special Photography Technique

Description.Name: EX Special Attack: Special Photography Technique
Chain Attack: Don't Mess With the Cat
Description.Desc:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Charges forward on Bubblegum, dealing massive <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.
Landing a heavy attack with this skill triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: Ultimate: Smash It All!
Description.Desc:
When Decibel Rating is at <color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> to activate:
After a series of hammer attacks, launches Bubblegum to cause an explosion, dealing massive <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color> to enemies in an area.
On activating the heavy attack, gains 6 <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpeners</color>.
Upon landing the downward attack from above on an enemy, triggers a <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> and restores <color=#2BAD00>{CAL:-50+AvatarSkillLevel(3)*250,1,2}</color> HP to all squad members.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: Chain Attack: Don't Mess With the Cat
Quick Assist: Sonic Beatdown
Description.Desc:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Unleashes a series of hammer attacks against enemies in front, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: Defensive Assist: Stage Fright
Description.Desc:
When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

Description.Name: Assist Follow-Up: Jump Training
Description.Desc:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Continuously jumps forward on the inflatable hammer, dealing massive <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color> to enemies in front.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

1491004.Name: EX Special Attack: Special Photography Technique

1491005.Name: EX Special Attack: Special Photography Technique (Quick Chain)
1491005.Desc: <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> (Keep holding when activating EX Special Attack: Bubblegum Barrage)

1491008.Name: Chain Attack: Don't Mess With the Cat

Name: Core Passive: Cuteness Is Justice
Additional Ability: Daydreamer's Counterpoint
Desc:
Characters in the <color=#FFFFFF>Angelic Chord-ination</color> state gain increased ATK, equal to <color=#FFFFFF>30%</color> of Sunna's initial ATK, up to a maximum of <color=#2BAD00>525</color> ATK. When Sunna's initial ATK reaches 1,750, the ATK bonus granted to all squad members reaches its maximum.
When attacks from Basic Attack: Naughty Cat Spotted, EX Special Attack: Bubblegum Barrage, EX Special Attack: Special Photography Technique, Chain Attack: Don't Mess With the Cat, or Ultimate: Smash It All! hit an enemy, apply <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> to the target for 12s. While Sunna is the currently active character, the duration of <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is continuously refreshed. Some normal enemies affected by <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> show reduced aggression toward Sunna.
When <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</color> characters in the squad continuously land attacks on enemies affected by <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is triggered and removed:
When triggered by an <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> character, deals the Agent's Attribute DMG equal to <color=#2BAD00>150%</color> of ATK to enemies in an area.
When triggered by an <color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</color> character, deals the Agent's Attribute DMG equal to <color=#2BAD00>240%</color> of ATK to enemies in an area. This DMG is guaranteed to CRIT, and the CRIT DMG is increased by <color=#2BAD00>80%</color>.
DMG dealt by <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is treated as DMG dealt by the triggering Agent.
When multiple enemies on the field have <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color>, only the primary attack target's <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is triggered. Upon triggering, <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is removed from all enemies on the field.
When an enemy is Stunned, the number of attacks required to trigger <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is significantly reduced.

When another character in your squad is an <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> character or shares the same Faction:
When characters inside <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil: Delusion Reprise</color> land attacks on enemies, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by 30% for 40s.
When Sunna enters the battlefield, she gains 15 Energy. In Investigation Zone mode, the effect can trigger once every 180s.

1.Name: "Loneliness Corruption Symptoms"
1.Desc: When Sunna enters the battlefield, she gains 15 Energy. In Investigation Zone Mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s. When <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> triggers and damages an enemy, the target's DEF is reduced by 7% for 40s, stacking up to 3 times. The duration of each stack is calculated separately.
1.Desc2:
It didn't matter if no one understood her. As long as she had music, that was enough. It didn't matter if no one ever talked to her first, either. She'd never expected them to anyway...
Being surrounded by people made her so nervous that she fled the world, using delusions to fill the empty space it left behind. She was the master of her own tiny realm, setting up "keep out" warnings at the edges, then painting everything bright with music.
"I'm not like them. I—I'm a lonely genius!"
She puffed out her cheeks and quietly wiped away the lonely tear that slipped from the corner of her eye.

2.Name: "Feline Go-With-the-Flow"
2.Desc:
While Sunna is within any <color=#FFFFFF>Ether Veil</color>, all squad members gain 10% ATK and she obtains 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpener</color> every 10s. The number of attacks required to trigger <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is reduced, and the DMG Multiplier on trigger is increased:
When triggered by an <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> character, the DMG Multiplier is increased by 200%.
When triggered by an <color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</color> character, the DMG Multiplier is increased by 300%.
2.Desc2:
"That kid's an odd one, always humming strange songs alone in the corner..."
Having heard such remarks all her life, she stopped hoping for any other kind of judgment.
Then, one warm and gentle afternoon, a dark-haired girl stretched her hand out like an angel.
Ah... so she had always been seeking this sense of being understood. Always... waiting for someone she could call a friend.
Even having grown accustomed to loneliness from endless practice, humans are still, in the end, social animals. That person lifted her out of damp, clinging solitude, and from then on, she had a shelter made of feathers.

3.Name: "Transformation Apple"
3.Desc2:
She has never before received praise from so many strangers.
"Those gentle songs gave me strength."
"Finding music I could resonate with at my saddest moment was so moving..."
"This style of music is so cute!!"
The girl stares nervously at the screen. The small red dot marking new messages quivers along with her heartbeat, as she opens the same window over and over again—
Just a little more... just a few more people seeing my music... a few more people seeing me, someone who's good for nothing but writing music...
All I want is for a few more people to take power from this.

4.Name: "Delusion Investigation Team"
4.Desc: When Sunna uses her <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color>, all squad members deal <color=#FFFFFF>18%</color> increased DMG for 60s.
4.Desc2:
From being dragged out the door by Nangong to signing her name on that contract... to the girl, the entire day passed as swiftly as a flash of summer lightning cutting through a rainy night.
Like a dream, like playing house... in the end, it all belonged to the realm of "delusion."
The moment they walked out, they were no longer three separate individuals, but a group: the Angels of Delusion. And the moment she walked out, she stopped being only Sunna, the songwriter working behind the scenes, and became an idol standing before her fans, expressing herself onstage.
—This overwhelming delusion descending upon her was the most incredible gift she had ever known.

5.Name: "Galaxy Tramway"
5.Desc2:
The stars were strung across the night like gas lamps lit at dusk.
She imagined that somewhere in the vast galaxy, someone was driving a clattering electric tram, setting off from pale morning light and heading straight toward infinity.
The passengers were all adorable little creatures like cats, dogs, and bunnies, and the conductor was fluent in the languages of deep-sea fish and owls.
Leaving behind the rush of everyday life, stepping away from mundane routines—
"If I could borrow the wings of the Angels of Delusion, maybe I could bring everyone into a world of music like this!"
Surrounded by the sugary aroma of a scented candle, she stretched with a soft yawn, then wrote this romantic dream onto the sheet music.

6.Name: "Hollow Big Bang"
6.Desc:
When Sunna uses an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, she enters the <color=#FFFFFF>Focused Creation!</color> state for 8s.
While in the <color=#FFFFFF>Focused Creation!</color> state, all attacks Sunna performs are guaranteed to CRIT, and her CRIT DMG increases by 0.03% of her initial ATK, up to a maximum of 105%.
While in the <color=#FFFFFF>Focused Creation!</color> state, Sunna's Anti-Interrupt Level is increased, and DMG taken is reduced by 40%.
While in the <color=#FFFFFF>Focused Creation!</color> state, Sunna can trigger <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color>, its DMG being calculated using <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> Agent rules. If <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is triggered while Sunna has a <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpener</color>, the <color=#FFFFFF>Claw Sharpener</color> is immediately consumed, and <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> is reapplied to the enemy.
While in the <color=#FFFFFF>Focused Creation!</color> state, DMG dealt when any squad member triggers <color=#FFFFFF>Cat's Gaze</color> increases by <color=#FFFFFF>50%</color>.
6.Desc2:
"Why did you choose to step onto the stage?"
Was it for the fans? For the glory under the spotlight? Or for that version of yourself who stayed in the corner, watching others play, too afraid to step forward?
Maybe it was all of those. Or maybe it was none of them.
All the girl knew was that the moment she gripped the microphone, her heartbeat would slow, and the world around her would fall quiet... until the drums kicked in, and the music rippled across the stage. In that split second, music's gentle light illuminated the time they all shared together.
It felt as if they were angels, with wings capable of carrying everyone away from "the here and now."

Strategy: Activating Ether Veil increases Stun DMG Multiplier
Provides bonus DMG Multiplier for Attack and Anomaly Agents
